name: Password Strength & Breach Checker
desc: A cybersecurity dashboard that evaluates password strength and detects whether the password has been exposed in known data breaches.

name: Phishing Email Detection
desc: A machine learning based system that detects phishing emails using text classification and NLP techniques.

name: AI-Powered Sanitization Monitoring
desc: Verifies wiping and sanitizer-spray actions and gives real-time feedback (Green Tick / Red Alert).

name: Agricultural Marketplace
desc: Online marketplace connecting farmers, suppliers, and buyers. Secure payments and improved product visibility.

name: Mentor Matrix
desc: Matches mentors and mentees based on skills and goals; increased pairing accuracy and engagement.

name: Swachh – Smart Waste Management System
desc: Swachh is an AI + Blockchain powered waste management solution designed to make cities cleaner and smarter.
